auth.name: Name
auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your portfolio
auth.registerDescription: Start tracking your crypto investments today
auth.secureAccessDesc: Your data is protected through modern security technologies. Access your portfolio with confidence and manage your investments safely.

home.title: Home
home.heroTitle: Invest in the Future with Cryptocurrencies
home.heroSubtitle: Discover a new way to invest. Cryptocurrencies offer you the opportunity to be part of the financial revolution, with 24/7 access to a global market.
home.whatAreCryptosDesc: Cryptocurrencies are digital currencies that use blockchain technology to ensure secure and decentralized transactions, without the need for banks or intermediaries.
home.decentralizationDesc: No government or entity controls the network. Transactions are verified by thousands of computers worldwide.
home.securityDesc: Every transaction is recorded in an immutable chain of blocks, providing maximum security and transparency.
home.accessibilityDesc: Send and receive money anywhere in the world, at any time, with low fees and no restrictions.
home.growthPotentialDesc: Cryptocurrencies have shown exponential returns, outperforming traditional investments.
home.market247Desc: Unlike traditional markets, crypto never sleeps. Trade any time of day or night.
home.diversificationDesc: Add a new asset class to your portfolio and reduce your overall risk exposure.
home.financialFreedomDesc: Take full control of your money without relying on banks or financial institutions.
home.ctaSubtitle: Explore new market opportunities, diversify your portfolio, and stay informed to make better investment decisions.
home.ctaTip1Desc: Don't put all your eggs in one basket. Spread your investments across different assets.
home.ctaTip2Desc: Knowledge is your best investment. Follow market trends and news every day.
home.ctaTip3Desc: The best investments are measured in years. Patience is the key to building wealth.

market.title: Market
market.subtitle: Real-time cryptocurrency prices and market data

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Manage your cryptocurrency investments
portfolio.startAdding: Start adding cryptocurrencies to track your investments
portfolio.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {coin} from your portfolio? This action cannot be undone.
portfolio.searchCoins: Search for a cryptocurrency to add to your portfolio
portfolio.updateHoldings: Update your holdings for this coin.

news.bitcoinDesc: Bitcoin has surged past previous records as institutional adoption continues to grow worldwide.
news.ethereumDesc: The long-awaited Ethereum upgrade brings faster transactions and lower fees to the network.
news.adoptionDesc: Leading financial institutions are now offering cryptocurrency custody and trading services.
